Class RegisterRequest

java.lang.Object
messages.RegisterRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RegisterRequest extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a registration request message sent within the system. This class encapsulates all necessary details required to register a new user. It implements Serializable to allow objects to be transmitted over a network.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    The defined role of the user within the system (e.g., ADMIN, CLIENT).

    serialVersionUID
    Serial version UID for ensuring serialization compatibility.
    private final int

    The unique identifier for the user.
    private final String
    username
    The login username chosen by the user.

  • Constructor Details

    • RegisterRequest

      public RegisterRequest(int userID, String name, String email, String phone, String username, int membershipCode, UserRole role)
      Constructs a new RegisterRequest with the specified details.
      Parameters:
      userID - the unique ID of the user
      name - the full name of the user
      email - the user's email address
      phone - the user's contact phone number
      username - the username for system authentication
      membershipCode - the code representing the user's membership level
      role - the UserRole assigned to the user
